text:
There was once a little girl named Olive. She loved stories. Every night after school she'd sneak into her mother's bed.

My mom reads lots of scary stuff.

Sometimes she'd pretend I was there. We'd fly together.

I'd be a giant rat.

Oh, you silly girl.

Maybe I'd eat worms.

I like worms.

I found big ones.

You might swallow.

Then I'd just go slowly.

Maybe I'd eat leaves.

But you'd die of poison.

Probably wouldn.

You'd stick in my belly.

I'd eat everything.

Olive.

Wouldn't starve.

You'd go somewhere wonderful.

Oh, I'd find you.

Where? Somewhere spooky.

You'd think I lived there.

Maybe I do.

I'd be careful.

We'd have fun.

We wouldn't dare.

You'd find I carry books.

Then I'd teach you.

We'd sail stars.

There we'd live.

Never leave.

Just imagine.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|>
